recommendations.title: The Plagues of Breslau
recommendations.overview: Every day at 6 pm a serial killer kills another person. Police officer Helena Rus thinks the killings are done by one man only and decides to reveal the killer's identity by getting back in 18th century history of the city.

recommendations.title: Boy A
recommendations.overview: Freed after a lengthy term in a juvenile detention center, convicted child killer Jack Burridge finds work as a deliveryman and begins dating co-worker Michelle. While out on the road one day, Jack notices a distressed child, and, after reuniting the

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Let Yourself Go
recommendations.overview: Depressed Jewish shrink Elia one day meets Claudia, a young and eccentric personal trainer.

recommendations.title: Gacy
recommendations.overview: Based on a true story of serial killer a model citizen, loving father and husband and serial killer John Wayne Gacy, a man with over 30 dead men and boys entombed in the crawl space underneath his house which he shared with his family.

recommendations.title: Kalifornia
recommendations.overview: A journalist duo go on a tour of serial killer murder sites with two companions, unaware that one of them is a serial killer himself.

recommendations.title: The Last Client
recommendations.overview: Renowned psychologist Susanne (Signe Egholm Olsen) is caught in a living nightmare when her new client (Anton Hjejle) turns out to be a wanted serial killer.

recommendations.title: Blitz
recommendations.overview: A tough cop is dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers.

recommendations.title: The Calendar Killer
recommendations.overview: Klara is going to die today unless she kills her husband instead. The Calendar Killer has given her that impossible choice. When Jules starts his night shift at a telephone safety helpline for lonely women on their way home, Klara's call reaches him.

recommendations.title: The Trixxer
recommendations.overview: A mysterious serial killer is shocking the underworld. Scotland Yard is investigating the case. Clues lead the detectives to Blackwhite Castle.
